articles.title: Jangoo: West Indies 'don't deserve' to be in World Cup qualifiers
articles.description: A one-wicket defeat in Barbados was West Indies' third loss in a row and a "difficult pill to swallow", as Amir Jangoo put it

articles.title: Gill puts spotlight on India's fitness record
articles.description: India's captain said the squad will need greater resilience for when next year's World Cup comes around

articles.title: Duckett 141 trumps Rohit 138 in Lord's run-fest
articles.description: England set India 388 in this series decider, and then refused to blink with the ball to secure a 2-1 series win - their first against India since 2018

articles.title: Chapman, Santner star in low-scoring thriller as NZ take series
articles.description: The visitors just about held their nerve in a chase of 189 to take an unassailable 3-1 lead in the ODI series

articles.title: Bangladesh win dramatic finale to clinch T20I series against Zimbabwe
articles.description: Tanzid Hasan anchored the chase with a half-century as Bangladesh won with two balls to spare

articles.title: New Zealand bowl with Mitchell injured; West Indies make four changes
articles.description: Greaves, Jangoo, Forde, and Seales replaced Campbell, Hetmyer, Paul and Pierre

articles.title: Zimbabwe opt to bat in series decider
articles.description: Bangladesh were without Nahid Rana, who suffered a side strain on Friday

articles.title: Manjot Kalra denies fixing allegations in LPL 2026
articles.description: Former India Under-19 player Manjot Kalra has been remanded until July 31 in Colombo

articles.title: Bumrah misses Lord's decider with injury; England bring in Tongue and bat
articles.description: KL Rahul, Arshdeep Singh and Prince Yadav come in for India; England leave out Saqib Mahmood in favour of Josh Tongue

articles.title: Hope wants West Indies to get 'the results we really want' to honour Sobers
articles.description: West Indies are 2-1 down in the five-match series against New Zealand, and need more wins to ensure direct qualification for the 2027 ODI World Cup

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: England vs India Highlights & Review – 3rd ODI
articles.description: England produced a commanding batting display to post a daunting 387/3 before restricting India to 360/7 to seal a thrilling 27-run victory and clinch the three-match series 2-1.

articles.title: Rohit Sharma scores a historic Lord's century with Shardul Thakur's bat
articles.description: During his breathtaking knock, few viewers noticed that Rohit was not using one of his regular bats.

articles.title: [WATCH] Teary-eyed Ritika Sajdeh reacts after Rohit Sharma's historic Lord's century
articles.description: The emotional reaction quickly went viral on social media, with fans celebrating both Rohit's landmark innings and the heartfelt moment shared by his family.

articles.title: Joe Root scripts England history with record-breaking feat during third ODI against India
articles.description: Root's latest knock also marked his third consecutive half-century in the ongoing ODI series against India.

articles.title: 'Kuldeep Yadav must be thinking of packing his bags and saying goodbye' - Mohammad Kaif slams India's decision to snub star spinner in 3rd ODI
articles.description: Mohammad Kaif lambasted the Indian team management for not selecting Kuldeep Yadav in the playing XI for the decisive third ODI between India and England at the iconic Lord's Cricket Ground on Sunday.

articles.title: The Hundred W: Match 1, MIL W vs SRL W Match Prediction – Who will win today’s LPL match between Mi London Women vs Sunrisers Leeds Women?
articles.description: The 2026 season of The Hundred Women will kick off on July 20.

articles.title: Former India Under-19 cricketer Manjot Kalra remanded by court in LPL corruption case
articles.description: Kalra has been remanded until July 31 by the Magistrate's Court in Colombo, after his arrest over corruption charges during the 2026 Lanka Premier League season.

articles.title: [Watch] Legendary Yuvraj Singh rings iconic Lord's bell ahead of ODI series decider
articles.description: The legendary Yuvraj Singh ringing the iconic bell at the Lord's Cricket Ground in London ahead of the decisive third ODI between India and England on Sunday, July 19.

articles.title: 'Korbo Lorbo Jeetbo' - Shah Rukh Khan congratulates LA Knight Riders for MLC triumph
articles.description: The Knight Riders lifted their first-ever MLC title after making the playoffs for the first time in the 2026 season.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: Why are Indian and English players wearing black armbands at Lord's?
articles.description: India have made three changes for the series decider, as KL Rahul, Arshdeep Singh, and Prince Yadav have come into the line-up, replacing Shivam Dube, Washington Sundar, and Jasprit Bumrah.
